layout.description: full_background = small camera window over full-screen background; face_only = camera only, no background

timing_seconds.description: Duration of this part in seconds

background_type.description: photo = static image; video = short clip; html_slide = rendered HTML template; screen = live screen capture during recording; none = no background (for face_only)

background_prompt.description: Prompt for background generation (always in English). Empty string for face_only and html_slide.

background_prompt_display.description: Prompt translated to user language for display in studio. Optional.

background_category.description: Category of HTML slide template. Required when background_type is html_slide.

claim.description: The claim/statement that the background should visually prove. Required when background_type is not none.

visual_proof.description: What the viewer should see as visual proof. Required when background_type is not none.

slide_data.description: Data for HTML slide template (numbers, text, colors). Required when background_type is html_slide.
